text: Alice from the Singapore branch reported a payroll data incident on Monday involving employee IDs 4821-4835. The response team recommended immediate account suspension, forensic review of the affected accounts, and a follow-up meeting next Tuesday at 10:00 AM in conference room B-301 to coordinate remediation.

sensitive_spans.text: forensic review of the affected accounts

text: HR policy requires that any payroll-related incident must be reported within 24 hours. All reports should follow the standard incident-response template and be filed with the security team.
